Bash(cd "F:/code/MyAttention/services/api" && python -c "
import asyncio
import sys
sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\)

from db.session import get_db
from db.models import Source, AntiCrawlStatus, AccessMethod
from sqlalchemy import select

async def check\(\):
    print\('=== 当前信息源的反爬配置 ==='\)
    async for db in get_db\(\):
        result = await db.execute\(select\(Source\).limit\(10\)\)
        sources = result.scalars\(\).all\(\)
        
        print\(f'{'名称':<20} {'反爬状态':<12} {'访问方式':<10} {'重试次数':<8} {'获取深度':<8}'\)
        print\('-' * 70\)
        for s in sources:
            print\(f'{s.name[:18]:<20} {s.anti_crawl_status.value:<12} {s.access_method.value:<10} {s.retry_count:<8} {s.fetch_depth:<8}'\)
        break

asyncio.run\(check\(\)\)
" 2>&1 | grep -v "INFO sqlalchemy")

Bash(cd "F:/code/MyAttention/services/api" && python -c "
import asyncio
import sys
sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\)

async def test\(\):
    from feeds.ai_tester import AITestingAgent
    
    agent = AITestingAgent\(\)
    
    print\('=== Running AI Test Suite ==='\)
    print\(\)
    
    result = await agent.run_full_suite\(\)
    
    print\('=== Test Results ==='\)
    summary = result['summary']
    print\(f'Total: {summary[\\"total\\"]}'\)
    print\(f'Passed: {summary[\\"passed\\"]}'\)
    print\(f'Failed: {summary[\\"failed\\"]}'\)
    print\(f'Pass Rate: {summary[\\"pass_rate\\"]:.1%}'\)
    print\(\)
    
    print\('=== Failed Tests ==='\)
    for r in result['results']:
        if not r['passed']:
            print\(f'  - {r[\\"test_name\\"]}: {r[\\"message\\"]}'\)
            if r['error']:
                print\(f'    Error: {r[\\"error\\"]}'\)
    
    print\(\)
    print\('=== Issues Found ==='\)
    print\(f'Total: {len\(result[\\"issues\\"]\)}'\)
    for issue in result['issues'][:5]:
        print\(f'  - [{issue[\\"severity\\"]}] {issue[\\"title\\"]}'\)

asyncio.run\(test\(\)\)
" 2>&1 | head -50)

Bash(cd "F:/code/MyAttention" && python -c "
import sys
sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\)
import requests
print\('Before restart - health check:'\)
try:
    r = requests.get\('http://localhost:8000/health', timeout=3\)
    print\(r.json\(\)\)
except Exception as e:
    print\(f'Error: {e}'\)

print\(\)
print\('Stopping service...'\)
import subprocess
subprocess.run\(['taskkill', '/F', '/IM', 'python.exe'], capture_output=True\)
print\('Stopped'\)

print\('Starting new service...'\)
subprocess.Popen\(['python', '-m', 'uvicorn', 'main:app', '--reload', '--port', '8000'], 
                 cwd='services/api', creationflags=subprocess.CREATE_NEW_CONSOLE if hasattr\(subprocess, 'CREATE_NEW_CONSOLE'\) else 0\)

import time
print\('Waiting for health...'\)
for i in range\(15\):
    try:
        r = requests.get\('http://localhost:8000/health', timeout=2\)
        if r.status_code == 200:
            print\(f'OK after {i+1}s'\)
            break
    except:
        pass
    time.sleep\(1\)

print\('Done'\)
")
